name: Northann Corp.
business: Northann Corp. manufactures and sells vinyl flooring and 3D printed flooring products, including its premium SuperOak line, primarily under the Benchwick brand. The company serves customers in North America (mainly the United States and Canada) and Europe. Revenue is generated through wholesale distribution (92.91% in fiscal 2025) and retail sales (7.09%).

exposures.sentence: We bring additive manufacturing, commonly known as 3D printing, and the volume production of innovative building solutions, to your home or business.

In addition, we are actively integrating artificial intelligence into our operations, including product design, production optimization, quality control, supply chain management and administrative functions.
The substrate layers of Blue Eleven products are made with 80% recycled ocean plastic, sanitized and processed for safe reuse.

catalysts.event: Full production capacity at South Carolina facility
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to reach full production capacity by mid-2027 and continues to ramp up operations.

catalysts.event: Commercial production start at South Carolina facility
catalysts.sentence: The Company has been installing equipment in its new factory in Fort Lawn, South Carolina, and expects to commence commercial production in Q2 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial purchase order from a major retailer
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company received an initial purchase order of approximately $2.0 million from a leading Midwest home improvement retailer for Benchwick flooring products.

catalysts.event: Completion of R&D for Blue Eleven and DSE technologies
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, the Company expects to complete the R&D of its proprietary Blue Eleven and DSE technologies in Q2 2026, which may further reduce the Company's production costs.

We have recently expanded our retail distribution footprint by entering vendor agreements with several of the largest home improvement retail chains in North America, which we expect to significantly increase our retail channel revenue beginning in fiscal year 2026.
